---
title: "CV & Contact"
description: "Download the CV of marine biologist Ilha Byrne and find contact and research profile links."
---

## Curriculum vitae

My full CV covers my education, research and lab experience, teaching, awards and funding, presentations, professional service and diving qualifications.

::: {.profile-links}
[<i class="bi bi-file-earmark-arrow-down-fill"></i> Download CV (PDF)](files/CV.pdf)
:::

## Contact

I am always happy to hear from potential collaborators, students and anyone interested in marine science and reef conservation.

- <i class="bi bi-envelope-fill"></i> &nbsp;**Email** — [ilhabyrne@gmail.com](mailto:ilhabyrne@gmail.com)
- <i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill"></i> &nbsp;**Based at** — The University of Queensland, Brisbane, Australia

## Find me online

::: {.profile-links}
[<i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i> ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-3909-2902)
[<i class="bi bi-mortarboard-fill"></i> Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=oH1BQmQAAAAJ)
[<i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub](https://github.com/ilhabyrne)
[<i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ilha-byrne-922a1782/)
[<i class="bi bi-instagram"></i> Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/biologist.byrne)
[<i class="bi bi-cloud-fill"></i> Bluesky](https://bsky.app/profile/ilhabyrne.bsky.social)
:::
